SEARCH
Package server.control

Class NotificationController

java.lang.Object
server.control.NotificationController
All Implemented Interfaces:
DomainController
public class NotificationController extends Object implements DomainController
Owns the notification domain: listing the logged-in actor's messages and acknowledging them. Stateless and shared across all client threads — only the final NotificationDAO collaborator is held as state.

Both ops derive the recipient from the ClientSession, never from a client-supplied id, so an actor can only ever read their own notifications: RequestType.LIST_NOTIFICATIONS lists by the session's actor id and kind (VISITOR → NotificationDAO.listForVisitor(long), otherwise NotificationDAO.listForUser(int)); RequestType.ACK_NOTIFICATION marks one notification read.

Sending is not a request type — notifications are produced as a side effect of other operations (reservation confirm/cancel, parameter-change decisions) via NotificationService, which both persists the row and pushes it to the online recipient.
